title: Legacy Trail 1BR
definition: Legacy Trail 1BR shows roughly -$600/month under these assumptions — negative carry unless revenue or basis improves.
reality_check: Insurance and fees creep over time

faq.a: It is a warning sign for income investors; others accept it for non-cash goals.
Lower mortgage payment, higher occupancy, or lower purchase price.
See the Canmore investment mistakes guide on this site.
